policies.name: default_current
policies.label: Default current policy
policies.description: Matches the repo's official score weights.

policies.name: latency_priority
policies.label: Latency-priority policy
policies.description: Emphasizes cycle count over implementation cost while still penalizing weak timing.

policies.name: area_priority
policies.label: Area-priority policy
policies.description: Emphasizes LUT and DSP cost over raw latency.

policies.name: timing_priority
policies.label: Timing-priority policy
policies.description: Rewards positive WNS strongly while still accounting for area and latency.

policies.name: balanced_no_throughput
policies.label: Balanced no-throughput policy
policies.description: Balances latency and implementation cost without adding any throughput term.
